feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP Gateway (OData)
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP Gateway (OData) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ODATA GET Issue with Postman
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Need your help on Below Query.

I Created Custom ODATA based on CDS ( with parameter ) on SAP S4 Private Cloud and able to execute or fetch result from gateway client and Browser. But if I am trying to Access same from Postman.( Need to use Same on CPI ).

I am getting Below Error.

Resource not found for segment '<CDSNAME>Type'.
 
Below is URL using on Postman.
GET
https://<server_details_port>/sap/opu/odata/sap/<CDS_Service>/<EntitySet>/(<list_of_paramaters_With_value_Sep_by_comma>
 
Any idea how to resolve this error?
 
Note: Correct Authentication is Maintained in Postman.
Only Encode URL Automatically and Automatically Follow Request settings are enabled. Rest all are disabled in postman including (SSL Certificate Verification).
Already tried to Load Meta Data Multiple times.
Metadata Fetching is working fine in Postman
 
Thanks,
PG

entry.title: Data from Virtual Element not getting fetched into OData API
entry.content:
We have implemented a logic in Custom CDS view to fetch Purchase order item text & Material PO text through Virtual Elements. But when we are Checking data in Odata API, virtual element data is not getting fetched.

We are using Std CDS for reference - I_PURCHASEORDERITEMNOTETP_2

Please help us & guide ! thanks !

entry.title: Odata Service for creating a financial transaction in S4 HANA, alternative for BAPI_FTR_CREATE, IRAT
entry.content:
Hello members

We have made a customn Odata service through which we are calling the required BAPIs to create a financial transaction in SAP S4 HANA system. But we want to avoid doing custom development in S4 HANA for the purpose of keeping the core clean. Is there any standard SAP provided Odata service available for the same purpose? If yes , please let me know which Odata service APIs can be used for creating financial transactions in SAP.  If no, can anyone suggest how can we call BAPI from CAPM(Cloud Application Programming , BAS on BTP)  or from outside SAP with proper error handling and return messages for the confirmation of successful or failed BAPI execution.

Please provide clues. Thanks. SAP BTP, ABAP environment NW ABAP Gateway (OData)

entry.title: Configure SAP Gateway service to ignore properties from payload that are not defined
entry.content:
Odata Service payload when implemented 

ex : 

{

"VendorRegistrationRecords": [

{

"Entity1": {

},

"Entity2": {

},

}

 

Due to changes in the partner system, they started sending payloads with 2 additional entities which can not be reverted. 

{

 

How can we ignore the new entity (3 and 4 )which is not available in current SAP OData

"VendorRegistrationRecords": [

{

"Entity1": {

},

"Entity2": {

},

"Entity3": {

},

"Entity4": {

}

}


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to use Content-ID to reference the ETag in an OData Batch Request?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm trying to send a batch request following the OData V4 Guideline: https://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_ReferencinganETag

My request body and the response is:

In my batch request, I tried to read an entity with Content-ID:1 and use this Content-ID as the referenced Etag in the If-Match part for the PATCH request. The response said my second request's syntax is wrong.

entry.title: SAPUI5 ODataListBinding.create duplicates entries
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

I am building an SAPUI5 application based on OData V2 build with SEGW.

I am facing a weird behavior: In a sap.m.Table my created entries are duplicated after submitting and refreshing.

The table is defined like this:

<Table
    id="KeyfToSourceTable"
    mode="{= ${keyfEdit>/editing} ? 'MultiSelect' : 'None' }"
    items="{
        path: '/MapKeyfSourceSet'
    }" >
    <headerToolbar>
        <OverflowToolbar>
        <Title text="Table" level="H3" />
        <ToolbarSpacer />
            <Button
                icon="sap-icon://add"
                press=".onDatasourceHelpRequested"
                visible="{keyfEdit>/editing}" />
            <Button
                icon="sap-icon://delete"
                press=".onDatasourceDeletePressed"
                visible="{keyfEdit>/editing}" />
        
        </OverflowToolbar>
    </headerToolbar>
    <columns>
        <Column>
            <Text text="Sourcestxt" />
        </Column>
        <Column>
            <Text text="Employeetext" />
        </Column>
        <Column>
            <Text text="SbTxtlg" />
        </Column>
    </columns>
    <items>
        <ColumnListItem vAlign="Middle">
            <cells>
                <ObjectIdentifier
                    title="{Sourcestxt}"/>
                <Text
                    text="{Employeetext}" />
                <Text
                    text="{SbTxtlg}" />
            </cells>
        </ColumnListItem>
    </items>
</Table>

It displays entities mapped to my main object. So I filter these at runtime (and sometimes I have to rebind the table):

var sourceSystemTable = this.byId("KeyfToSourceTable");
var keyfId = this.getView().getBindingContext().getProperty("Keyfid");
var filterArray = [new Filter("Keyfid", FilterOperator.EQ, keyfId)];
sourceSystemTable.bindItems({path:"/MapKeyfSourceSet", template: oldTemplate, filters: new Filter(filterArray, true)})

The User should be able to edit the main object and the mapping table and just save at the end. But the table should display the new entries, which are not persisted yet. Therefore I use the ODataListBinding.create function like it is discribed in the documentation:

this.byId("KeyfToSourceTable").getBinding("items").create(oEntry, {
    inactive : false,
    success: function(data) {
        alert("success createdMapping");
    },
    error: function(data) {
        alert("error createdMapping");
    }
});

It works as designed, new Entries are shown and not persisted until the user clicks "save" and submitChanges() is called.

But after a refresh() is called or the Binding of the table is changed, the new entries are duplicated. They are added at the top of the table again. I already looked at the BindingContexts of the items and the binding of the table, the bindings seem absolutly the same.

Even when I look at a differend main object and the filter doesn't seem to work for these duplicates. They also appear at the top of the table. But looking at the binding and also getting the filterted property, they shouldn't be there. These duplicates don't exists in the backend/data base tables. They also all are not transient, so I am not able to filter them by myself.

I assume these duplicates are just in the client model.

I appreciate any help,
Kind regards

Tobias

entry.title: Get SEGW project from V4 Odata service - API_WAREHOUSE_RESOURCE
entry.content:
Hi All,

I tried looking on SCN and most of the threads mention table /IWBEP/I_SBD_SV and /IWBEP/I_SBO_ET but I could not find the details. I also tried serching in SEGW using patterns but no luck.

Could you please let me know how can we get SEGW project from V4 Odata service - API_WAREHOUSE_RESOURCE

Thanks !!

entry.title: SACF scenarios were automatically set to productive with Active check after using SWPM
entry.content:
The SAP S/4HANA Production application servers were migrated (Hardware migration). The SAP standard Software provisioning tool (SWPM) was used to perform this migration using the System copy option. There was no change at the Database side.

After this migration, we found that SWPM has by default set the SACF scenarios to Productive and Active. SWPM logs confirm that the Functional module SACF_SET_SBD was run due to which the scenarios were activated.

Before migration, these scenarios were not active at all. But post migration, with the scenarios active, users are facing issues while accessing various apps.

For some reason, we didn't have this issue in our lower environments, but are facing this in Production.

What would be the best approach to fix these issues in production, since we don't have the SACF productive scenarios active in lower environments? 

Would disabling the SACF productive scenarios help to get the Production back to normal?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How do I pass the raw data as content for Attachment API_DOCUMENT_SRV
entry.content:
I have a requirement for an application I've developed where, upon clicking an attachment, the camera opens, allowing the user to take a picture and send it to the SAP S4 system. The issue arises when sending the data to SAP: although I'm passing it in Base64 format and it is stored correctly against the document number attachments, attempting to open the file results in a "file not supported" error.

our landscape application developed in Neptune open edition-->goes through API suite to S4

entry.title: Odata Service $skip vs. $skiptoken
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have checked this blog (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/difference-between-skip-and-skiptoken-in-odata/ba-p/13560047), and understood that the difference between $skip and $skiptoken is as follow.

$skip ->client-controlled paging

$skiptoken -> server-side paging

However, is there any difference when it comes to use-case in the reality?

For example, what I assume now is that maybe one of them would consume more data than the other. (I do not know if this is true.)

 

Could someone kindly advise on this?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Enable to enable OAuth for Odata service created in SAP system
entry.content:
Hello SAP Folks,

I have exposed an S4HANA table as Odata service in SAP system. The Odata service works perfectly fine when tested with CRUD operations in SAP gateway client as  well as Browser. Also tested the same in Postman it works fine.

screenshot for reference

@

My question is : now I want to consume this into an Non SAP Application using oAuth client where i need  to pass below details  how can i enable / generate this details  for the Odata service that i have  created.

Can someone pls help here.

Thanks in advance

Regards,

Mellinda

@BobShen 

@SAPCommunity 

@odata 

 

OData

entry.title: Custom Date Input Field in Manage Customer Line Items App
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

 

As I added the date custom field in Manage Customer Line Items App and it added to the filterbar properly by extending the standard OData service FAR_CUSTOMER_LINE_ITEMS.

 

But I want to achieve this date custom field UI behavior like other existing date field UI behavior. 

For example, when we select the date in the standard field "Open on Key Date", we can select Date, Today, Yesterday, Tomorrow etc. 

 

 How can we achieve the same in the custom date field?

 

Regards,

Tamilselvan

entry.title: Failed to generate the backend operation proxy for RFC
entry.content:
When I try to generate the odata of my project I am faced with this error and no matter what I did it won't generate, I don't have any open requests that includes another entity of the odata
I have tried to remap the entity that uses that function module and removed all the variables that uses the data type P and still no luck any help

entry.title: Configure the SWFVISU for Parked document
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am currently trying to create the visualization parameters on SWFVISU for displaying header and item information of 'Parked Document' (Business Object: FIPP) I was looking for the corresponding My Inbox FIORI Service, and i came up with one service 'Verify Journal Entries in General Ledger - For Processor (Inbox)',

I tried to fill all the parameters in my custom task (TS90000084) based on standard task,

 

however, it didnt work and it showed error 

Can anyone share the correct visualization parameter for custom decision task of Parked Document (FIPP)?

 

Regards,

Muhammad Febrian Rizky

entry.title: Assistance Required for Integrating local Application developped by asp.net with SAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Expert,
I'm seeking assistance with integrating our local application, which has been developed using Microsoft .NET, into SAP Cloud. 
I would like to leverage SAP’s cloud platform to enhance my application’s capabilities and streamline data sharing between the two systems. 
I would appreciate your guidance on the necessary steps and requirements for this integration.
Please let me know what information or actions are required from our side, and any specific documentation or support that we might need.
Thank you for your assistance


Kind regards
Saidi

entry.content:
hi,

I have to do a Select with an internal table in Inner Join, but I get this error:

entry.title: Service OData v4 - Republish service group
entry.content:
I've deleted an OData v4 standard service group on /IWFND/V4_ADMIN in order to republish it, but when I try to publish it again, I get the error message indicating:

"Selected service group not found or already published"

Any suggestion on how I can republish it?

entry.title: SAPUI5 PDFViewer Not Working : Underlying iframe was not found in DOM.
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm currently working on a SAPUI5 application that needs to display a PDF from the ABAP backend.

The OData Service is OK. Tests with Gateway Client are positive.
Just one point : I had to adapt the content-disposition to pass ‘inline’ instead of 'attachment' on ABAP system (SEGW)
>>> In order to display my PDF in the SAPUI5 application and no longer download it.

Now, I'm encountering another error in my SAPUI5 application
>>> FYI My SAPUI5 Version is "1.120.0"

The PDFViewer say "The PDF file could not be loaded."
And in the console I see the error message "Underlying iframe was not found in DOM."
My OData request is OK. The problem seems to be with my SAPUI5 application.

The code is relatively basic.
A PDFViewer on a view with setSource and setVisible, I also tried with Open method but same error.

I found the SAP Note https://me.sap.com/notes/3429273/E but the properties "isTrustedSource" does not seem to be available with my version of SAPUI5 ("1.120.0").

I also tested my application with SAPUI5 version"1.120.20" on SAP BAS, In this case, I receive the message "Download the file to view it".
>>> Downloading works well, but that's not the purpose of the application.

How can I display the PDF content directly in the application?
In my case, downloading is not an option ...

Thanks in advance for your help.
YouriC

entry.title: occurs obsolete abap
entry.content:
hi,

I need to create a table that takes a structure that I created in SE11.
I used the Occors command:

DATA: gt_test LIKE ZTEST OCCURS 1000.

what can I use instead of occurs?

thank you

entry.title: Manage Purchase Order App with Extended CDS with Field Control
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

We have been extending the Manage Purchase Order App by Extending the underlying Items CDS Views. Whole manage Purchase Order was designed and Deployed with BOPF. Due to limitations we have been using this approach by Extending the CDS Views. 

1. I see the newly extending field in SEGW and App 

2. now based on certain fields I need to enable and disable the field- for this I have been using the Fieldcontrol BADI . However in the field Control Purchase Item BADI , it is not showing the Extended field to control. 

I see the Custom Field Fields based out of Business Context , however not the Extended Field with underlying CDS. 

Does anyone face this kind of limitation with Field Control BADI on PO or any other applications. 

 

Thanks and Regards,

Bharani
